description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, set on a rectangular grassy plot with a driveway leading to a covered carport on one side. The exterior features a mix of light beige and dark brown paneling, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light to the interior. The front facade is accented by two conical evergreen shrubs flanking the main entrance, and the driveway is bordered by additional landscaping. The layout includes multiple rooms visible through the open roof, with distinct living, dining, and bedroom areas, as well as a garage or storage space. The rear and side elevations showcase expansive glass panels and a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a functional, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roof, large windows, and a mix of beige and dark brown exterior panels, set on a grassy lot with a driveway and carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two evergreen shrubs, driveway, and carport on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, grouped windows, and the transition from driveway to backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view with large glass panels, sliding doors, and a clear view of the backyard and carport structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows, beige paneling, and the continuation of the grassy lot.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
